mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in nonfarm payrolls signals improving labor market conditions, raising expectations for future economic activity and inflation, which pushes the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward yield changes during rising payrolls periods do not differ significantly from baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the CPI index exceeds a level consistent with above-target inflation, the market prices in earlier Fed tightening, compressing bond prices and pushing the 10-year yield higher over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If triggered instances show negative 20-day yield changes more than 40% of the time over a 3-year walk-forward, or the signal's information coefficient is below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous decline in unemployment and rise in industrial production indicates robust economic momentum, which increases growth and inflation expectations, driving the 10-year yield higher over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If the joint signal produces positive 20-day yield changes in fewer than 55% of instances over a 3-year walk-forward, or the interaction term in a regression is not significant at the 10% level.

mechanism_narrative: During the zero interest rate policy regime, rising housing starts reflect strong demand in a rate-sensitive sector, signaling broader economic strength that pushes the 10-year yield higher over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If during ZIRP episodes the signal fails to yield a positive average 20-day yield change (null hypothesis: mean <= 0, alternative > 0, p < 0.10) over a 3-year window, or the Rank IC is below 0.03 consistently.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in retail sales signals robust consumer spending, boosting GDP growth expectations and leading to higher 10-year Treasury yields over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If walk-forward Rank IC over a 2-year rolling window is below 0.03, or the top decile of RSAFS changes does not produce significantly higher yields than the bottom decile (two-sample t-test p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: During economic expansions with real GDP growth above 2%, rising industrial production signals tightening supply capacity, which raises inflation expectations and pushes the 10-year yield higher over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: If over a 3-year walk-forward period the average 5-day yield change following INDPRO increases during identified expansions is not significantly positive (one-sided t-test p < 0.10), or the strategy Sharpe ratio is below 0.5.

mechanism_narrative: A large month-over-month decline in nonfarm payrolls signals sudden labor market weakness, which reduces growth and inflation expectations, pushing the 10-year yield lower over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: If triggered instances produce positive 60-day yield changes more than 40% of the time over a 5-year walk-forward, or the average yield change is not significantly negative (one-sided t-test p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous rise in unemployment and below-trend inflation signals disinflationary recession risk, which markets price as lower future interest rates, driving the 10-year yield down over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If triggered instances produce positive 20-day yield changes more than 30% of the time over a 3-year walk-forward, or the interaction coefficient in a linear regression is not negative and significant at the 5% level.
